reviews.comment:
Simuló que me cargó los puntos en la serviclub, no cargo nada. 20/12 por la.tarde.

(Translated by Google)
He pretended to add the points to my account at the service station, but nothing was actually added. 20/12 in the afternoon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNHVxd2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
No tienen tarjeta , ni factura dolo Cash. Y eso no me parece justo. Mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept cards or receipts, only cash. And that doesn't seem fair to me. Poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCLU0yei1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excel ente atención por parte de los playeros muy educados y predispuestos para auxiliar al cliente en lo que necesite

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants, very polite and willing to help the customer with anything they needed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdUp2VjZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasé de madrugada y estaba cerrado. Llegué con lo justo a otra estación. Si van a cerrar de noche aclárenlo en los horarios en vez de decir "Abierto las 24hs".

(Translated by Google)
I went by in the early hours and it was closed. I barely made it to another station. If you're going to close at night, make that clear in the opening hours instead of saying "Open 24 hours".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCa0tQRzBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los pibes siempre atienden de primera por eso el promedio les da 2 estrellas.
Pero siempre les faltan insumos, no anda la app, solo efectivo, etc. El management para atrás

(Translated by Google)
The staff always provide excellent service, which is why the average rating is 2 stars.

But they're always short on supplies, the app doesn't work, it's cash only, etc. Management is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtXzlLekJREAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención, demoró muchísimo en cargar no tiene código QR no dan ticket, desastre.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, it took ages to load, there's no QR code, they don't give a receipt, a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbzdlNXZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien, algo lenta la atención por poco personal estamos acostumbrados a esto. Estación del ACA, todo impecable y muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very good, the service was a bit slow due to staff shortages, but we're used to it. ACA station, everything was spotless and the service was excellent.

reviews.comment:
La del bar me atendió para el or.... Mismo
Un compañero se estaba haciendo Acá encima y lo deje para que le utilice el ñoba🤣🤣🤣🤣 dijo que estaba tan mojado el piso que si se llegaba a tirar un dope se le llenaban los bolsillos de agua

The girl at the bar helped me for the or.... Same
A friend was doing it on top of me and I left him to use the ñoba🤣🤣🤣🤣 He said the floor was so wet that if he spilled a dope his pockets would fill with water
